PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 22, 2022 is admitted to probate. Darren Wallace is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 24, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is to be filed one week prior to the hearing date. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Colohour. Not reported.
